description: Add a build-time gate that flags a non-additive config.schema.json diff — a removed or renamed key, or a new required field under the root additionalProperties:false — unless paired with a registered migration. Adopt the expand-contract discipline: new fields land optional; existing fields are not removed or renamed until a later contract release.
acceptance_criteria: A non-additive config.schema.json diff absent a paired migration fails the build-time gate.
An additive diff (a new optional field) passes the gate.
New config fields land optional; a field removal or rename is gated to a contract release.
notes: Build-time-gate family with FGAP-094 (TASK-067). Open parameter the plan step MUST fix explicitly before implementation: the diff BASELINE — what the additive gate compares config.schema.json against (prior git revision, a recorded baseline hash, or the published catalog copy); neither this task nor FGAP-097 specifies it, and criterion 1 is not executable until it is decided.
